description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named RocksDB Tests that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow has four jobs: osx_test, gcc_test, clang_test, and windows_test, each running on a different environment (macos-latest, ubuntu-18.04, ubuntu-18.04, and windows-latest respectively). Each job checks out the repository with submodules, installs dependencies, and runs tests with specific scripts and environment variables.
